title: Robertsganj Heat Wave
lead: Robertsganj is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.91. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Robertsganj has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 24%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 9.8 km/h may provide some relief, but the overall conditions remain severe.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
energia_impact: Power demand surges due to cooling
